overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's commercial district. The journey progresses from a covered neon-lit plaza with reflective marble floors through open pedestrian areas and along busy sidewalks next to multi-lane traffic, ending in a narrow steam-filled alley. The environment features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, tropical planters, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza, passing by tropical planters and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the planter boxes

entered.detail: large structural canopy covering the pedestrian plaza with geometric support beams
tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
large rectangular planters containing palm trees and dense tropical foliage
building entrance with circular illuminated signage and glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a semi-covered pedestrian plaza with highly reflective marble floors. Towering buildings covered in digital billboards rise on both sides, while large planters with tropical vegetation line the walkway. The NCART station entrance is visible on the right with its distinctive circular signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to street intersection

events.description: exits the covered plaza into an open sunlit area with full sky visibility
approaches the multi-lane road with moving vehicle traffic becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the street, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the same direction toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with direct sunlight and clear blue sky above
busy urban street with multiple lanes of traffic and crosswalk markings
massive dark skyscraper with MILITECH corporate branding visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide sunlit plaza as the character leaves the covered area. The MILITECH building looms in the distance on the left. The character approaches a busy multi-lane road with moving traffic, transitioning from the sheltered plaza to the exposed street environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside elevated highway and corporate towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering MILITECH building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to busy traffic, briefly looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: cars and trucks moving along the multi-lane road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass and highway ramp running parallel to the sidewalk
large holographic advertisement displaying a colorful cyberpunk character face

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to moderate traffic, with the massive MILITECH building now dominating the left side. An elevated highway structure runs along the right, casting shadows. Large digital billboards display vibrant cyberpunk advertisements. The camera briefly tilts up to emphasize the scale of the towering corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with steam vents and industrial facades

events.description: turns into a narrow alleyway with steam vents and reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alley, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking toward the camera from the alley

entered.detail: darkened passage between industrial buildings with yellow-black warning stripes on pillars
industrial pipes releasing white steam into the alley atmosphere
wall with spray-painted text and industrial signage

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow, shadowed alleyway leaving the busy street behind. The environment becomes industrial with steam vents releasing vapor, graffiti-covered walls, and dim lighting. A pedestrian in red approaches from the opposite direction as the character moves deeper into the enclosed service corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polished, neon-lit corporate plaza into the gritty, industrial depths of a city alleyway. It begins by gliding across reflective marble floors beneath towering digital billboards and tropical planters, passing the circular signage of an NCART station. As the character leaves the sheltered area, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit plaza where the massive Militech building looms in the distance before the camera transitions toward a busy multi-lane road. The movement continues along a concrete sidewalk beneath the shadow of an elevated highway, briefly tilting upward to emphasize the scale of the corporate architecture and vibrant advertisements. Finally, the camera turns away from the traffic and into a narrow, shadowed alley, where the bright city lights are replaced by dim lighting, graffiti-covered walls, and billowing steam vents.
